programme.desc: S1 E62 Gopi and Rashi, cousins, are married into the same wealthy family. As they strive to cope with family relations, they also attempt to become better versions of themselves.
programme.title: Saath Nibhaana Saathiya

programme.desc: S1 E145 Shivprasad slips into the precinct to interrogate Raju regarding the mysterious Manali incident. Elsewhere, Sheetal fuels household suspicion by inviting Shalini to her wedding.
programme.title: Mr & Mrs Parshuram

programme.desc: S1 E28 Ishaan requests Nayanika to allow him to support her at all times. Feeling overwhelmed, he decides to cancel his sessions to be with her.
programme.title: Sairaab

programme.desc: S1 E70 Lalit shows Aparajita a love letter, exposing Rakshit's deepest feelings. Later, she apologises to Rakshit for rejecting him, explaining that her heart has absolutely no room for romance.
programme.title: Oh Humnava Tum Dena Saath Mera

programme.desc: Though they get off to a bad start, an aspirational Saili and an unmotivated Sachin end up getting married. Saili then tries to turn her husband into a competent person.
programme.title: Udne Ki Aasha

programme.desc: S1 E5208 Dr Pradhan is requested to perform Armaan's surgery. In order to perform the operation and save his life, the doctor postpones her daughter's wedding.
programme.title: Yeh Rishta Kya Kehlata Hai

programme.desc: Anupamaa sacrifices her personal ambitions to dedicate her life to her family. However, she eventually decides to live on her own terms after failing to receive credit for her many trials.
programme.title: Anupamaa

programme.desc: Tulsi and Mihir Virani navigate the ensuing challenges that emerge in their family which has endured a lengthy passage of time.
programme.title: Kyunki Saas Bhi Kabhi Bahu Thi

programme.desc: S1 E102 Hrithik and Dev celebrate the arrival of their newborns amidst immense family joy. However, the happiness shatters when the doctor reveals that Vrinda's baby tragically could not be saved.
programme.title: Kyunki Rishton Ke Bhi Roop Badalte Hain

programme.desc: S1 E37 Single mother Dr. Noyonika helps pop star sensation Ishaan regain his voice, to the delight of her daughter. But tensions rise as they fall for each other.
programme.title: Sairaab

programme.desc: S1 E90 Virat is an IPS officer who loves Pakhi deeply. However, things become complicated when he has to let go of his love, Pakhi, and marry Sai.
programme.title: Ghum Hai Kisikey Pyaar Meiin

programme.title: Yeh Rishta Kya Kehlata Hai
